steps.title: Point back to the location
steps.content: The previous sentence says the atomic-clock readings are sent to BIPM in France. The next sentence explains what BIPM metrologists do at that place, so the transition needs to point back to the location just named.

steps.title: Reject example and contrast signals
steps.content: B and C would introduce examples, but assembling the readings is not an example of sending them to France. D would introduce an opposition that is not present. The context needs a locational signal. The answer is A.
